response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken dialogue in the introductory segment required manual transcription as the Reference JSON provided only general scene descriptions. Musical vocals perfectly match the provided song lyrics for 'Pollyanna (I Believe in You)'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized lyrics for the musical segment; manual transcription and translation were used for the first 70 seconds of banter. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to vocal starts. Subtitles were split or truncated during rapid banter to maintain readability and avoid cascading delays.

subtitles.original: みんなでやろう！みんなで、えーっと...
subtitles.english: Let's do it together! Let's all, uh...

subtitles.original: せーの！ Congratulations Standing Ovation!
subtitles.english: Ready... set... Congratulations Standing Ovation!

subtitles.original: ねえねえ、ねね先輩が一番チャラいわ！
subtitles.english: Hey, Nene-senpai is the most flashy one!

subtitles.original: チャラチャラ！
subtitles.english: Flashy, flashy!

subtitles.original: 本当に素晴らしい時間だったね！
subtitles.english: That was truly a marvelous time!

subtitles.original:
でも悲しいことに、次で最後の曲になっちゃうの。
グランドフィナーレの準備をしなくちゃ！
subtitles.english:
But sadly, the next one is our final song.
I must prepare for the grand finale!

subtitles.original:
すぐに戻ってくるね！ねね、いろは、
少しの間観客のみんなを楽しませておいてね！
subtitles.english:
I'll be back very soon! Nene, Iroha,
please keep everyone entertained for a bit!

subtitles.original: 二人にお願いしたよ！オッケー、待ってろ！また後でね！
subtitles.english: I'm counting on you two! Okay, wait for me! See you later!

subtitles.original: バイバーイ！頑張って！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye! Good luck!

subtitles.original:
さあ、今夜のスターのリズは一体最後に
何を見せてくれるのでしょうか？
subtitles.english:
Now, what kind of final performance will tonight's star,
Liz, show us?

subtitles.original:
楽しみですね！じゃあ皆さん、見るそのままので！
それでは行きましょう！
subtitles.english:
We are so excited! Everyone, stay tuned!
Here we go!

subtitles.original: おい！ You're watching ERB TV!
subtitles.english: Hey! You're watching ERB TV!

subtitles.original: せーの、万歳！
subtitles.english: Ready... set... Huzzah!
